title: Crawl Graph, Frontier State Machine, Scheduling Identity, and Invariants · Inference Brief: Frontier States

Competency probe: Define discovered, rejected, queued, claimed, fetching, fetched, parsed, failed, retryable, terminal, and canceled transitions.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Frontier States model · Theory Frontier States, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Queued, visited, fetched, and complete are interchangeable states.
